expectedClassifications.notes: 2 depth-2 ternary chains (lines 40 and 58) trigger extraction rule. Line 40: sort-order cycle mapping inside handleClick. Line 58: aria-sort attribute mapping. Both are value-level ternaries (string mapping), not structural JSX branching. Source: src/ui/components/8flow/Table/TableHead.tsx

3 distinct observation kinds: JSX_TRANSFORM_CHAIN (headerGroups.map), JSX_TERNARY_CHAIN (multiple), JSX_INLINE_STYLE (cursor style). Boundary case: exactly 3 kinds, the minimum for hotspot. Source: src/ui/components/8flow/Table/TableHead.tsx
